items.title: CNBC Daily Open: Investors sell off tech despite steady Broadcom numbers
items.description: In the near term, investors may still be flighty, unless something concretely reassuring, such as Oracle achieving positive cash flow, takes place.

items.title: Wall Street strategists are divided over valuations
items.description: Strategists are divided on valuations — specifically, on the direction of the forward price-earnings (P/E) ratio as it hovers near five-year highs.
